beats.description: Frantic 911 call and immediate aftermath of a severe dog attack on a 6-year-old boy.
Deputies arrive on scene, transport the child, and begin initial questioning of family members.
Conflicting accounts emerge about the dog's ownership and location of the attack, raising suspicion of deception.
Hospital interview with the victim reveals he was handcuffed during the attack, prompting a search warrant.
Execution of the search warrant, retrieval of the hidden dog, and intense interrogations uncovering systematic restraint of the children.
Discovery of a Snapchat video showing the sister tied to a chair, Dylan's admission of prior knowledge, and Angelina's jail call shifting blame.
Legal resolutions, sentencing details for all involved parties, and confirmation of the children's recovery and new custody arrangement.

_analysis_metadata.transcript_preview: My stepson just got bit in the throat or the side by the neck by a dog. >> He took one with the blood and he went like >> holy >> his whole entire face was like >> I want to know why I Please don't touch me. >> I didn't do this wrong. I can't. [sighs and gasps] You guys don't understand how bad this is going to get. >> On August 17th, 2024, a 6-year-old boy is mauled in a vicious pitbull attack. While his family attempts to hide the terrible truth, an unexpected discovery unravels one of the most sinister crimes the county has ever seen. >> If I had seen that, I would have lost my ...
